creator: zillion1@o2.pl
text:
OK, never mind.

I've got problems with /usr/include files after switching from 13-STABLE to 13.2-RELEASE.

There was a big mess, so I had to clean /usr/include and extract older files from base.txz.

A little help I found here: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=273323

Now it's working.
